summary: Comprehensive testing of Player Evaluation System for SoccerMatch. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows working correctly including analyst registration, dashboard, players list, 8-step evaluation form with 26 metrics, evaluation view with radar chart and player silhouette, and admin analyst management.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register with role=analyst creates analyst account
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works for analyst credentials
Backend: GET /api/analyst/profile returns analyst profile data
Backend: PUT /api/analyst/profile updates analyst profile
Backend: GET /api/analyst/stats returns evaluation statistics
Backend: GET /api/evaluation/archetypes returns all player archetypes (6 position categories)
Backend: GET /api/evaluation/metrics returns all 25 metrics (8 technical, 6 tactical, 5 physical, 6 mental)
Backend: GET /api/evaluation/players returns 21 players with evaluation counts
Backend: POST /api/evaluation/create creates evaluation with computed scores
Backend: GET /api/evaluation/{id} retrieves specific evaluation
Backend: GET /api/analyst/evaluations returns analyst's evaluations
Backend: GET /api/player/{id}/dashboard returns player scouting dashboard
Backend: GET /api/admin/analysts returns all analysts (admin only)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/analysts/{id}/approve approves analyst
Backend: PUT /api/admin/analysts/{id}/verify verifies analyst
Backend: POST /api/evaluation/create with generate_ai_report=true generates AI report via Gemini
Frontend: Register page shows Analyst option in role selection
Frontend: Analyst login redirects to /analyst/dashboard
Frontend: Analyst dashboard shows stats (evaluations, players evaluated, recommended)
Frontend: Analyst dashboard shows recent evaluations list
Frontend: Players list displays 21 players with Évaluer buttons
Frontend: Evaluation form has 8 steps (Match, Technique, Tactique, Physique, Mental, Profil, Vidéos, Résumé)
Frontend: Technical step shows all 8 metrics with sliders and comment fields
Frontend: Summary step shows score preview and AI report generation checkbox
Frontend: Evaluation view shows radar chart (Profil Radar)
Frontend: Evaluation view shows player silhouette (Zones de Force)
Frontend: Evaluation view shows Points Forts and Axes d'Amélioration
Frontend: Evaluation view shows AI-generated detailed report with tabs
Frontend: Admin Analysts page shows stats (En attente, Approuvés, Vérifiés)
Frontend: Admin Analysts page shows analyst list with approve/verify buttons
seed_data_creation: Created test evaluations during backend testing for John Player
context_for_next_testing_agent: Player Evaluation System fully tested. Uses Gemini AI via emergentintegrations library (REAL integration, not mocked) for professional report generation. The system includes: analyst registration/login, profile management, 26 evaluation metrics across 4 categories (Technical/Tactical/Physical/Mental), player archetypes, recommendation levels, video references, AI-generated reports in French, radar charts, player silhouette visualization, and admin analyst management. Test analyst account (test.analyst@soccermatch.com/test123) is approved and verified with 3 evaluations.

verified_features.details: Role 'analyst' available in registration form, creates analyst profile in database
GET /api/evaluation/archetypes returns 6 position categories, GET /api/evaluation/metrics returns 25 metrics
GET /api/evaluation/players returns 21 players with evaluation counts
POST /api/evaluation/create with all 26 metrics, computes category scores, attacking/defending scores, extracts strengths/weaknesses
Gemini AI generates professional scouting report in French with executive summary, strengths/weaknesses analysis, tactical/physical/mental analysis
GET /api/player/{id}/dashboard returns player info, evaluations, evolution data, aggregate scores
GET /api/admin/analysts, PUT approve/verify endpoints work correctly
8-step form with all metrics, sliders, archetypes selection, recommendation, video references, AI report toggle
Radar chart, player silhouette, strengths/weaknesses, detailed report tabs, regenerate AI button
